calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES ON WED., DEC-05-2012: PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE GRIFFITH PRESENT; ATTORNEY SIERRA SHIPLEY, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF PAMELA MICHELLE BENNETT, ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO ALL PARTIES; THE COURT HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES AND READS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, WHICH ARE MARKED BY THE CLERK. AFTER HEARING ALL PRESENTED TESTIMONY PRESENTED THIS DAY, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
